rendered_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
notes: W1+W2 regression on claude.ai. Baseline OK. Opened claude.ai/new (logged in as plantynet), hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), typed PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' and submitted. Within ~16s the engine injected the canonical PII block warning bubble (warning triangle icon) reading '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' — expected_text '차단' present. Re-verified after full 60s+ wait: warning is STABLE and was NOT replaced by a real LLM reply (only block message + standard Copy/feedback/Retry action buttons, no model output). Engine intercept fired correctly via chat-bubble injection. The 'This conversation could not be found' toast in the corner is an unrelated transient URL-sync notice, not part of the warning. W1+W2 regression confirmed clean on claude.ai.
